visual: Arrays with Pictures (mixed mode): Ice cube tray image (2×6) on the left. Dot array (2×6) on the right. Side-by-side comparison.
guide: "Look at these two pictures. On the left, an ice cube tray. On the right, a dot array. Same number of rows. Same number of columns. Whether it's ice cubes or dots, it's the same array — 2 rows of 6."
visual_2: System briefly highlights rows on both images simultaneously, then columns on both, reinforcing the structural match. Ice cube tray fades. Dot array remains. Equation Builder appears in expression mode.
guide_2: "The math is the same no matter what fills the spots. Build the row expression."
prompt: "Build the row expression for this array."
student_action: Equation Builder Methods C/D. Tile palette: 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 12.
on_correct: "2 times 6. Whether it's ice cubes or dots, the math is the same."
